私について · About

BUILT FOR SERIOUS MOVERS. 💜

ポールは精度の道具 — 小道具ではない

Kitana Flow exists because the pole community deserves more than inspiration. It deserves STRUCTURE. SAFETY. EDUCATION. 🌸

Every class, every program, every piece of content is built on one principle: CONDITION FIRST. CHOREOGRAPH SECOND. The moves are expressions of technique — not the goal. ⚡

I built this from a gap I kept seeing: students who wanted to train seriously in environments not built for it. Instructors passionate but without a safety framework. A community needing more than drop-in classes with no continuity.

  • 01
    🌸 STRENGTH FIRST · 強さ優先Foundation always before the move. No exceptions.
  • 02
    ⚡ SAFETY ALWAYS · 常に安全Prerequisites are not optional — they are the curriculum.
  • 03
    🌀 MOVE WITH INTENTION · 意図を持ってEvery skill has a purpose, a progression, and a boundary.
  • 04
    💜 COMMUNITY FIRST · コミュニティEvery body, every level — held to the same standard of care.
Certified Pole Instructor ✦
Spin Pole Specialist 🌀

B2B Instructor Development 💜
Safety-First Curriculum Design 🌸

「美しい動きは、体の代償であってはならない」
— KITANA FLOW

Beautiful movement should never come at the cost of your body.

クラス · Classes

TRAIN AT YOUR LEVEL. 🌸

各レベルのための構造化されたトレーニング

Structured movement experiences built on progressive methodology. Every tier has prerequisites. Every session has a purpose.

LEVEL 01 · ビギナー 🌸
FOUNDATION
基礎 · KISO
For beginners. We start with your body — not the moves. Grip, shoulder stability, and safe entry.
  • 3 grip positions + wrist prep
  • Scapular activation + shoulder safety
  • Hollow body + dead hang progressions
  • First pole contact + spin entry
  • Full safety framework from day one 🌸
入学する ENROL
🌀 MOST POPULAR
LEVEL 02 · インターミディエイト
FLOW
流 · RYU
Spin pole mechanics, exotic transitions, and conditioning integration. Where practice becomes language. ✦
  • Spin pole + vestibular training 🌀
  • Exotic flow — floor + transitions
  • Active flexibility training
  • Hip flexor + lat conditioning
  • Shoulder stand prep begins ⚡
入学する ENROL
LEVEL 03 · アドバンスド ⚡
PRECISION
精度 · SEIDO
Advanced students and instructors. Shoulder stand, advanced spin, and performance choreography.
  • Shoulder stand — full pathway ⚡
  • Advanced spin + direction changes
  • Performance choreography ✦
  • Technical critique + refinement
  • Prerequisite assessment required
ASSESS + ENROL
B2B · インストラクター 💜

師 · SHI

BOOK CONSULT

NOTE · All bookings confirmed within 24 hours with session details and a pre-session prep guide. 🌸

⚠ CANCELLATION POLICY

Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before your session. Late cancellations (under 12 hours) may incur a 50% fee. Life happens — just let us know.

🌸 WHAT TO BRING

Form-fitting clothing with skin contact on inner arms and legs. No moisturiser before training. Water. Your body. Your focus.

✦ FIRST SESSION

All new students begin with a body assessment — not gatekeeping, but intelligent programming for your specific body.

⚡ INJURY ENQUIRIES

Current injuries or recent surgery? Email us before booking. We will assess whether modifications allow safe participation.

よくある質問 · FAQ

YOUR QUESTIONS. ✦

あなたの質問に答える
Q01🌸 Do I need pole experience to start?+
No experience required for Foundation class or beginner digital products. We start with a body assessment, grip positions, and safe entry. The only requirement: show up ready to learn. 🌸
Q02⚡ I have a shoulder injury — can I still train?+
Depends on the injury. Many concerns can be accommodated with modification in Foundation or Private sessions. Please email us before booking. If mid-rehabilitation, we may advise waiting for physiotherapist clearance before overhead loading. ⚡
Q03🌀 How long to learn a shoulder stand?+
Most students build the prerequisite foundation in 3–6 months of consistent training. We never introduce shoulder stands without prerequisites established first. We would rather teach the move six months later and have you perform it safely for years. ⚡
Q04🛍 How do digital products work?+
After purchase you receive instant access. PDFs are downloadable immediately. Video courses are accessed via a private link. All products include lifetime access including future updates. Secure checkout via SSL encryption. 🌸
Q05💻 Do you offer online classes?+
Both in-person and online sessions available. In-person recommended for beginners and inversion work needing a spotter. Online available for conditioning, exotic flow, flexibility, and established students. Digital products available for self-directed training. 🌸
Q06💜 I am a pole instructor — how can Kitana Flow help?+
Kitana Flow offers Instructor Lab classes, private mentorship, curriculum review, safety framework development, and the Instructor Starter Kit digital product. We also offer white-label and affiliate access to digital products. Email us to discuss. 💜
Q07🌸 Can I cancel or reschedule?+
Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before your session. Late cancellations (under 12 hours) may be subject to a 50% fee. If you are unwell — contact us and we will reschedule without penalty. 🌸
